title: Capstone: Religion, Wellbeing, and Your Integrated Toolkit
titleAr: الختام: الدين والرفاهية ومجموعة أدواتك المتكاملة
learningObjective: After this exercise, the user will synthesize all 14 days of learning and create a personal wellbeing plan that integrates spiritual and psychological resources.
learningObjectiveAr: بعد هذا التمرين، سيدمج المستخدم جميع الدروس المتعلمة في خطة رفاهية شخصية.

content.scenario:
Congratulations on completing 14 days of Religion Hub!

Your Toolkit Summary:
✓ Positive Coping (Day 1) — Collaborative religious coping
✓ Benevolent Reappraisal (Day 2) — Finding meaning
✓ Community Support (Day 3) — Healthy vs. controlling
✓ Forgiveness (Day 4) — Release without condoning
✓ Prayer as Coping (Day 5) — Types and boundaries
✓ Hope & Optimism (Day 6) — Active vs. passive
✓ Gratitude & Patience (Day 7) — Evidence-based practices
✓ Spiritual Bypassing (Day 8) — Faith masking pain
✓ Punitive Reappraisal (Day 9) — God's 'punishment' belief
✓ Scrupulosity (Day 10) — When devotion becomes distress
✓ Radicalization Awareness (Day 11) — Protecting your mind
✓ Healthy Engagement (Day 12) — Balance criteria
✓ Scholar vs. Therapist (Day 13) — Complementary roles
✓ Integration (Day 14) — Your personal plan
content.scenarioAr: مبروك على إكمال 14 يوماً من Religion Hub!

task.instructions: Create your personal wellbeing integration plan.

items.text: My positive coping practices: [Choose 2 from Days 1-7]
items.explanation: Having specific, named practices (e.g., daily gratitude + weekly community connection) makes them more likely to become habits.

items.text: My warning signs to watch for: [Choose 2 from Days 8-11]
items.explanation: Self-awareness of potential risks (e.g., spiritual bypassing, punitive thinking) is protective.

items.text: My support resources: Scholar + Therapist + Crisis (16328)
items.explanation: Having a mapped support network (spiritual + professional + emergency) is the most resilient configuration.

feedback.correct: Outstanding! You've completed the Religion Hub program with a personal integration plan. Remember: faith and wellbeing work together, not against each other.
feedback.correctAr: ممتاز! لقد أكملت برنامج Religion Hub مع خطة تكامل شخصية.
feedback.incorrect: Complete all three sections. Your plan should include: positive practices, warning signs, and support resources.

whatNotToDo: Don't think this is the end — wellbeing integration is a lifelong practice
Don't forget: Dar al-Ifta (107) for religious guidance, GSMHAT (16328) for mental health support
evidence: VanderWeele, T.J. (2017). On the promotion of human flourishing. PNAS, 114(31), 8148-8156.
safetyNote: ⚠️ For support: GSMHAT 16328 | Dar al-Ifta 107 | Al-Azhar Observatory
com_b_mechanism: Full religion-wellbeing synthesis builds integrated capability for balanced faith
